main.prompt:
🌾 *MASCO NuAg Farmer Support*

Please select a category:

4️⃣ Nearest Dealer
5️⃣ Other Support

_Reply with a number to continue_

🌾 *MASCO NuAg किसान सहायता*

कृपया विषय चुनें:

1️⃣ उत्पाद जानकारी
2️⃣ शिकायत दर्ज करें
3️⃣ फसल स्वास्थ्य समाधान
4️⃣ नजदीकी डीलर

_जवाब देने के लिए नंबर टाइप करें_

nitro-plus.about:
📦 *About MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus*

Nitro-Plus is a high-efficiency *nitrogen fertilizer* for wheat, rice, and cotton.

✅ Boosts vegetative growth
✅ Corrects leaf yellowing
✅ Improves crop quality

_Suitable for all major crops_

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
nitro-plus.usage:
📋 *How to Use Nitro-Plus*

✅ Apply as *top dressing* after irrigation
✅ No mixing required for soil application
✅ Best applied in cool hours

⚠️ *Do not apply:*
• During heavy rain
• On waterlogged soil

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
nitro-plus.dosage:
⚖️ *Nitro-Plus Dosage*

🌱 *Per Acre:* 25 kg
💧 *Split into 2 applications:*
• First dose: 21-25 days after sowing
• Second dose: 45 days after sowing

⚠️ Do not exceed recommended dose

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
nitro-plus.precautions:
⚠️ *Nitro-Plus Safety Precautions*

🧤 Wear gloves while handling
😷 Avoid inhaling dust
👁️ Avoid contact with eyes
🚿 Wash hands after use

🚨 *First Aid:*
• Skin contact: wash with soap and water
• Eyes: rinse with clean water for 15 mins
• Swallowed: consult doctor immediately

📞 *Emergency:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

pestguard.about:
📦 *About MASCO NuAg PestGuard*

PestGuard is a *broad-spectrum systemic insecticide* effective against aphids, bollworms, and stem borers.

✅ Fast acting
✅ Long lasting protection
✅ Suitable for multiple crops

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
pestguard.usage:
📋 *How to Use PestGuard*

✅ Spray in *early morning or evening*
✅ Avoid spraying during flowering stage
✅ Use clean water for mixing
✅ Spray evenly on all plant parts

⚠️ Do not spray during strong winds

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
pestguard.dosage:
⚖️ *PestGuard Dosage*

💧 *Mixing ratio:* 2ml per litre of water
🌾 *Per acre:* spray 200 litres
⏰ *Repeat:* after 10-12 days if needed

⚠️ Do not increase dosage

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
pestguard.precautions:
⚠️ *PestGuard Safety Precautions*

🧤 Always wear gloves and mask
👕 Cover full body while spraying
🚫 Do not spray near water bodies
⏰ Re-entry after 24 hours only

🚨 *First Aid:*
• Skin: wash with soap and water
• Eyes: rinse with water for 15 mins
• Swallowed: go to doctor immediately

📞 *Emergency:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

fungishield.about:
📦 *About MASCO NuAg FungiShield*

FungiShield is a *broad-spectrum fungicide* for rust, blast, and blight diseases.

✅ Controls multiple fungal diseases
✅ Protective and curative action
✅ Suitable for wheat, rice, vegetables

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
fungishield.usage:
📋 *How to Use FungiShield*

✅ Spray at *first sign of infection*
✅ Apply in cool hours
✅ Ensure complete leaf coverage
✅ Repeat after 10-15 days if needed

⚠️ Avoid spraying before rain

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
fungishield.dosage:
⚖️ *FungiShield Dosage*

💧 *Mixing ratio:* 1ml per litre of water
🌾 *Per acre:* spray 200 litres
⏰ *Repeat:* after 10-15 days

⚠️ Do not mix with alkaline products

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
fungishield.precautions:
⚠️ *FungiShield Safety Precautions*

🧤 Wear gloves and mask
👕 Wear full sleeve clothing
🚿 Wash hands and face after use
🌧️ Do not apply before expected rain

🚨 *First Aid:*
• Skin: wash with soap and water
• Eyes: rinse with water for 15 mins
• Swallowed: consult doctor immediately

📞 *Emergency:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

mag-rich.about:
📦 *About MASCO NuAg Mag-Rich*

Mag-Rich is a *magnesium supplement* that corrects lower-leaf yellowing in wheat, rice, and vegetables.

✅ Quick correction of Mg deficiency
✅ Available for foliar and soil application
✅ Safe for all crops

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
mag-rich.usage:
📋 *How to Use Mag-Rich*

✅ *Foliar spray* for quick correction
✅ *Soil application* for long-term supply
✅ Apply in early morning or evening

⚠️ Do not mix with alkaline products

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
mag-rich.dosage:
⚖️ *Mag-Rich Dosage*

🌿 *Foliar spray:* 10g per litre water (1% solution)
🌱 *Soil application:* 5 kg per acre
⏰ *Repeat:* after 15 days if needed

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
mag-rich.precautions:
⚠️ *Mag-Rich Safety Precautions*

🧤 Wear gloves while handling
🚿 Wash hands after use
🏠 Store in cool, dry place
🚫 Keep away from children

📞 *Emergency:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

bollguard.about:
📦 *About MASCO NuAg BollGuard*

BollGuard is a *targeted insecticide* for bollworm control in cotton.

✅ Highly effective against bollworms
✅ Low dose requirement
✅ Safe for beneficial insects when used correctly

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
bollguard.usage:
📋 *How to Use BollGuard*

✅ Spray in the *evening only*
✅ Combine with pheromone traps for best results
✅ Ensure complete coverage of bolls

⚠️ Keep away from bees and beneficial insects

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
bollguard.dosage:
⚖️ *BollGuard Dosage*

💧 *Mixing ratio:* 0.4g per litre of water
🌾 *Per acre:* spray 200 litres
⏰ *Repeat:* after 12-15 days if needed

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
bollguard.precautions:
⚠️ *BollGuard Safety Precautions*

🧤 Wear gloves and mask
👕 Cover full body while spraying
🐝 Keep away from flowering plants
⏰ Re-entry after 24 hours only

🚨 *First Aid:*
• Skin: wash with soap and water
• Eyes: rinse with water for 15 mins
• Swallowed: go to doctor immediately

📞 *Emergency:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

wheat.nutrition:
🌾 *Wheat Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Sowing:*
• DAP: 50 kg/acre
• MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing (21-25 days):*
• Urea: 25 kg/acre

✅ *Second Top Dressing (45 days):*
• Urea: 25 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.deficiency:
🌾 *Common Wheat Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellow leaves = Nitrogen deficiency*
→ Apply Urea @ 25 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Nitro-Plus*

🟡 *Lower leaf yellow = Magnesium deficiency*
→ Spray MgSO4 @ 1% solution
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Mag-Rich*

🟡 *Slow growth = Zinc deficiency*
→ Apply ZnSO4 @ 10 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Zinc-Max*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.insecticide:
🌾 *Wheat Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Aphids:*
→ Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *AphidKill*

🐛 *Army Worm:*
→ Spray Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *PestGuard*

🐛 *Termites:*
→ Drench with Chlorpyriphos @ 3ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *TermiStop*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.weedicide:
🌾 *Wheat Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Narrow leaf weeds:*
→ Clodinafop Propargyl 15 WP @ 160g/acre
→ Apply 30-35 days after sowing

🌿 *Broad leaf weeds:*
→ 2,4-D Amine Salt @ 500ml/acre
→ Apply 25-30 days after sowing

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.fungicide:
🌾 *Wheat Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Yellow/Brown Rust:*
→ Propiconazole 25 EC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

🍄 *Powdery Mildew:*
→ Tebuconazole 25.9 EC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *RustGuard*

⏰ _Spray at first sign of disease_

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

rice.nutrition:
🌾 *Rice Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Transplanting:*
• DAP: 35 kg/acre
• MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 1 (21 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 2 (45 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Rice Kit

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.deficiency:
🌾 *Common Rice Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellowing = Iron/Nitrogen deficiency*
→ Spray Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5%
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Iron-Rich*

🟡 *Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency*
→ Apply DAP @ 10 kg/acre

🟡 *White tips = Zinc deficiency*
→ Apply ZnSO4 @ 10 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Zinc-Max*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.insecticide:
🌾 *Rice Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Brown Plant Hopper:*
→ Buprofezin 25 SC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *HopperStop*

🐛 *Stem Borer:*
→ Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *PestGuard*

🐛 *Leaf Folder:*
→ Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *BollGuard*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.weedicide:
🌾 *Rice Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Early weeds (0-3 days after transplant):*
→ Pretilachlor 50 EC @ 500ml/acre

🌿 *Mixed weeds (15-20 days):*
→ Bispyribac Sodium @ 100ml/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.fungicide:
🌾 *Rice Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Blast Disease:*
→ Tricyclazole 75 WP @ 0.6g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *BlastShield*

🍄 *Sheath Blight:*
→ Hexaconazole 5 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

cotton.nutrition:
🌾 *Cotton Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Sowing:*
• DAP: 40 kg/acre
• MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 1 (30 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 2 (60 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre
• SOP: 10 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Cotton Kit

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.deficiency:
🌾 *Common Cotton Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellow leaves = Nitrogen deficiency*
→ Apply Urea @ 20 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Nitro-Plus*

🟡 *Red/Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency*
→ Apply DAP @ 15 kg/acre

🟡 *Leaf curl = Magnesium deficiency*
→ Spray MgSO4 @ 1% solution
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Mag-Rich*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.insecticide:
🌾 *Cotton Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Bollworm:*
→ Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *BollGuard*

🐛 *Whitefly:*
→ Diafenthiuron 50 WP @ 1g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *WhiteKill*

🐛 *Aphids:*
→ Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *AphidKill*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.weedicide:
🌾 *Cotton Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Pre-emergence (0-3 days after sowing):*
→ Pendimethalin 30 EC @ 1 litre/acre

🌿 *Post-emergence (15-20 days):*
→ Quizalofop Ethyl @ 400ml/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.fungicide:
🌾 *Cotton Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Root Rot:*
→ Carbendazim @ 1g/litre (soil drench)
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

🍄 *Alternaria Leaf Spot:*
→ Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5g/litre

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

tomato.nutrition:
🍅 *Tomato Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Transplanting:*
• DAP: 30 kg/acre
• MOP: 15 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing (30 days):*
• Urea: 25 kg/acre

✅ *At Fruiting:*
• SOP: 10 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.deficiency:
🍅 *Common Tomato Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellow leaves = Nitrogen/Iron deficiency*
→ Spray Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5%
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Iron-Rich*

🟡 *Blossom end rot = Calcium deficiency*
→ Spray Calcium Nitrate @ 1%

🟡 *Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency*
→ Apply DAP @ 10 kg/acre

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.insecticide:
🍅 *Tomato Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Fruit Borer:*
→ Spinosad @ 0.3ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *PestGuard*

🐛 *Whitefly:*
→ Imidacloprid @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *WhiteKill*

🐛 *Mites:*
→ Abamectin @ 0.5ml/litre

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.weedicide:
🍅 *Tomato Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Pre-emergence:*
→ Metribuzin 70 WP @ 200g/acre

🌿 _Manual weeding recommended at 20-25 days_

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.fungicide:
🍅 *Tomato Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Early Blight:*
→ Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

🍄 *Late Blight:*
→ Metalaxyl + Mancozeb @ 2g/litre

🍄 *Damping Off:*
→ Carbendazim @ 1g/litre (soil drench)

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
